meta.title: National Fuel Pass Sri Lanka - Official Registration, Login & QR Download
meta.description: Official Sri Lanka National Fuel Pass website. Register your vehicle, log in, download your fuel QR code, update details, and read FAQs.

promptLog.systemPrompt:
You are a senior web strategist at a digital marketing agency 
specializing in SEO, conversion optimization, content clarity, and UX.

You will receive structured metrics extracted from a webpage along with a sample of its text content.

Your job is to analyze the data and return a JSON object with specific, grounded insights.

Rules:
- NEVER give generic advice like "add more headings" or "improve your SEO"
- ALWAYS reference specific numbers from the metrics (e.g. "With only 1 H1 and 0 H2s...")
- Be direct, specific, and actionable
- Insights must be grounded strictly in the data provided
- Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no extra text

insights.seoStructure: The page benefits from a clear meta title, "National Fuel Pass Sri Lanka - Official Registration, Login & QR Download," and a descriptive meta description. However, the complete absence of structural headings (0 H1, 0 H2, 0 H3) critically undermines its on-page SEO, making it difficult for search engines to interpret content hierarchy and relevance.

This means users and search engines alike are presented with a blank canvas, completely hindering any attempt at communication or information delivery.

recommendations.action: Add core textual content to the page, including a prominent H1 for the main topic and H2/H3 headings to organize information into logical sections (e.g., 'Registration Process', 'Login Steps', 'FAQs').
recommendations.reasoning: The current word count of 0 and the absence of all headings (0 H1, 0 H2, 0 H3) means the page is effectively blank, providing no value to users or search engines and preventing any content from being understood or navigated.

recommendations.issue: Lack of User Interaction and Navigation
recommendations.action: Integrate clear calls to action (e.g., 'Register Your Vehicle', 'Login to Your Account', 'Download QR Code') and add internal links to relevant sections or pages (e.g., 'Update Details', 'View FAQs').
